articles.title: Download AI Lab and try it for free
OPENAI HAS TRIPLED THEIR CRAWL OF THE WEB: AN ANALYSIS OF 7B+ LOG FILES
articles.summary: OpenAI is scaling crawl activity, so brands need to treat AI bots as a discovery channel alongside search. Total crawl volume has tripled since August 2025, while direct user-triggered visits dropped 28%. This signals greater reliance on cached indexes and automated retrieval. Post GPT-5, OpenAI has leaned more on search than training, making real-time visibility more important than static training data inclusion. Crawl behavior varies by industry, requiring vertical-specific optimization. Google still dominates at 18.2B monthly crawl events versus OpenAI's 887M, but OpenAI has grown from 1.38% to 4% of Google's crawl share in a year.

articles.title: AI'S IMPACT ON EARLY-CAREER MARKETERS IS REACHING A CRISIS POINT
articles.summary: Entry-level marketing roles focused on execution tasks like copywriting and landing page creation are declining as AI can now handle much of this work. Employment among workers aged 22-25 has fallen 16% relative. The broader job market is also cooling, with only 181K jobs added in 2025. Companies are hiring more cautiously and rely on AI to increase productivity instead of expanding teams.

articles.title: HOW TO BUILD LOCATION PAGES THAT RANK, CONVERT, AND GET CITED
articles.summary: Strong location pages can rank in search, appear in AI answers, support ads, and convert leads. However, most fail due to thin, reusable content. Add real local value through neighborhood details, regional pain points, original photos, clear service areas, and locally specific FAQs that cannot be copied across markets. Testing 30 queries across three AI platforms showed Perplexity citing business sites 73%, ChatGPT using editorial “best of” lists 22%, and Google AI Mode relying heavily on Yelp and Reddit. The key is to combine SEO structure with unique local depth to improve visibility.

articles.title: WHY SNOWFLAKE WINS BEFORE RIVALS START
articles.summary: Snowflake removes onboarding friction so users can self-serve before sales involvement. Prospects sign up instantly, receive $400 in credits, and run queries in minutes instead of going through 6-9 month enterprise cycles and delayed POCs. Engineers adopt first, which pushes finance and IT to approve Snowflake while it is already in production. Usage expands through built-in scaling as customers add compute and workloads without new contracts.

articles.title: BUILD MARKETING AGENTS IN CLAUDE CODE (WEBINAR)
articles.summary: In this webinar, Laura Beaulieu, founder of GrowthLoops.io, will cover what's possible with AI agents, why it matters for your role, and where to start. She'll walk through setting up the CLAUDE.md foundation and how to orchestrate agents together to hand off work like a team. The free webinar will take place on April 28 at 8 AM PT.

articles.title: 6-STEP LEAD SIGNAL SYSTEM
articles.summary: A signal-based lead system captures intent from website visitors, demo viewers, form fills, ROI tools, downloads, and newsletter signups using RB2B, Navattic, and Surface Labs. All signals flow into Freckle, where they are automatically enriched with firmographic data. ChatGPT then scores each lead against an ICP using this data and website context to filter for fit. Only qualified leads receive phone enrichment to avoid wasted spend, and those leads are routed to sales via Slack with full engagement history. Optional tools like Claude and ElevenLabs can generate personalized microsites or outreach.

articles.title: THE PRODUCT CONTEXT YOU ALREADY BUILT ISN'T DRIVING GROWTH—YET
articles.summary: Growth slows when teams recreate answers instead of reusing existing knowledge. Repeated questions show where to build templates that combine FAQs and past materials, with AI drafting and teams refining for reuse. This cuts response time from hours to minutes and builds a system that gets stronger with each use.

articles.title: HOW MUSIC MARKETING WORKS
articles.summary: Modern music marketing is heavily engineered, with teams running fan pages, seeding content, and using algorithm tactics to simulate organic buzz. TikTok and Meta now control distribution more than traditional media, amplifying only select artists. Labels use streaming and engagement data to spot talent, so existing momentum is required before signing. Awareness can be manufactured through these systems, but fandom still depends on an authentic connection with audiences.

articles.title: GETTING CITATIONS USING SPARKTORO
articles.summary: Use SparkToro's “Identify Media Outlets” to get links, mentions, and reach.

articles.title: HOW TO GET BIGGER, QUICKER WINS BY OPTIMIZING YOUR TESTING WORKFLOW
articles.summary: Faster growth comes from fixing the bottleneck in your testing workflow, not from generating more ideas.
